content: Robert Downey Jr; Chris Evans; Mark Ruffalo; Chris Hemsworth; Scarlett Johansson; Jeremy Renner; Don Cheadle; Paul Rudd; Brie Larson; Karen Gillan; Josh Brolin
The remaining Avengers attempt to undo the Snap by collecting the Infinity Stones from the past using time travel.
Restore everyone erased by the Snap.
The Avengers travel to different points in the past to collect the Infinity Stones.
Tony Stark creates time travel and sacrifices himself to defeat Thanos.
Steve Rogers returns the Infinity Stones and remains in the past with Peggy Carter.
Thor joins the final battle after overcoming his guilt.
Natasha Romanoff sacrifices herself for the Soul Stone.
Clint Barton retrieves the Soul Stone.
Carol Danvers helps in the final battle.
Scott Lang introduces the Quantum Realm solution.
Tony Stark defeats Thanos at the cost of his own life.
